release_review.summary: Adds explicit Runtime Service open-readiness metadata so Desktop only enables or completes environment opening after the runtime declares Env App attach readiness; updated Desktop builds require this runtime capability.
checked_surfaces: startup report and local-ui runtime state carriers

Desktop managed runtime start, attach, and open gating
